falsifiers.name: F1_amplitude_clears_roomT
falsifiers.desc: PASS = stacked_tc(400 meV, 3D) >= 293 K — the ~400 meV exciton + L_3D lever clears room-T amplitude (the axis H_020's 300 meV trio MISSED). FAIL = under 293 K.

falsifiers.name: F2_glue_over_clears_demand
falsifiers.desc: PASS = 400 meV exceeds the omega required for room-T with the 3D lever (~349 meV) -> positive margin. FAIL = the exciton does not even meet the relaxed room-T demand.

falsifiers.name: F3_sc_leads_when_frustrated
falsifiers.desc: PASS = at eta_nest=0.35 (below the critical 0.45) SC is the leading instability over SDW/CDW/PS — frustration unlocks SC-leading. FAIL = competing order still leads.

falsifiers.name: F4_sc_beats_cdw
falsifiers.desc: PASS = U_sc < U_cdw at the frustrated nesting — SC pre-empts 1T-TiSe2's intrinsic CDW specifically. FAIL = the CDW channel still goes unstable before SC.

falsifiers.name: F5_control_unfrustrated_sc_subleads
falsifiers.desc: PASS = at eta_nest=0.85 (commensurate, CDW-on) SC is NOT leading — the SC-leading result is bought BY frustration, not by construction. FAIL = SC leads even unfrustrated.

falsifiers.name: F6_not_green_conditional_only
falsifiers.desc: PASS = is_green is False — the verdict stays 🟠-CONDITIONAL because the coexistence (CDW suppression + surviving 400 meV exciton in a real host) is UNVERIFIED. FAIL = the run claims 🟢 without that coexistence proven (tune-to-green / over-claim).
